inventory.title: Account Recovery Exposure Probe
inventory.description: Measures how much account-recovery metadata is publicly exposed across discovered profiles.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: Contact Ember Analyzer
inventory.description: Correlates exposed emails/phones across platforms and calculates contact mesh density.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: Cross-Platform Activity Timeline
inventory.description: Extracts public date hints across profiles to build a lightweight activity timeline.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: AES Attachment Cipher
inventory.description: Encrypts or decrypts attachment-like text payloads using AES-CFB.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: ROT13 Attachment Cipher
inventory.description: Applies ROT13 transform on attachment-like payloads for reversible text masking.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: XOR Attachment Cipher
inventory.description: Applies XOR transform on attachment-like payloads for reversible obfuscation.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: Darkweb Tor Intelligence
inventory.description: Collects passive onion references and Tor-aware Ahmia search hints from public investigation context.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: Domain Takeover Risk Probe
inventory.description: Flags subdomains that look deprovisioned or dangling based on passive DNS resolution signals.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: Email Pattern Inference
inventory.description: Infers possible corporate mailbox formats from usernames and target domain artifacts.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: Entity Link Intelligence
inventory.description: Follows public bio/entity links in a controlled depth-limited way for deeper public-context gathering.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: Header Hardening Probe
inventory.description: Performs deep security-header assessment on target HTTPS response headers.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: Identity Fusion Core
inventory.description: Aggregates confidence, mention density, and identity overlaps into a fusion index.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: Link Outbound Risk Profiler
inventory.description: Classifies discovered outbound links by trust, transport security, and suspicious sharing patterns.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: Media Intelligence Core
inventory.description: Extracts public image metadata and optional OCR text from profile-linked media.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: Media Recon Engine
inventory.description: Runs public image, thumbnail, video-endpoint, and post-text reconnaissance for profile intelligence.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: media_recon_shared
inventory.description: No description provided.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: Module Capability Matrix
inventory.description: Maps plugin-like module signals from source-intel trees into scope-aware insights.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: OCR Batch Processor
inventory.description: Summarizes batch coverage, failures, preprocessing lanes, and engine runtime health for OCR scans.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: OCR Extractor
inventory.description: Runs OCR extraction across local or remote image sources and preserves raw recovered text.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: OCR Regex Filters
inventory.description: Extracts emails, URLs, phones, mentions, hashtags, names, and keywords from OCR text.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: Orbit Link Matrix
inventory.description: Builds platform-to-domain linkage and shared outbound domain signals.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: Post Signal Intelligence
inventory.description: Extracts OSINT cues from public profile and post-like text fragments harvested during profile scans.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: RDAP Lifecycle Inspector
inventory.description: Evaluates RDAP status, nameserver metadata, and change recency to surface domain governance risk.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: Security.txt Analyzer
inventory.description: Parses security.txt content for disclosure channels and policy completeness.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: Signal Fusion Core
inventory.description: Runs internal connector lanes and merges normalized signals into silinosic_x workflows.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: Stego Signal Probe
inventory.description: Scores public image assets for lightweight stego-suspicion indicators such as entropy and container density.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: Subdomain Risk Atlas
inventory.description: Classifies discovered subdomains by environment and high-risk naming patterns.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: Surface Transport Stability Probe
inventory.description: Scores transport availability, redirect posture, and probe failures for domain surface resilience.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: Threat Conductor
inventory.description: Combines correlation, issue distribution, and scan quality into an executive risk signal.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X

inventory.title: Username Impersonation Probe
inventory.description: Detects high-similarity username variants in mentions and profile artifacts that may indicate impersonation.
inventory.author: Silinosic-X
